message:
feat(runtime): enhance reactive system, coalescer, writer, and undo

Observable (reactive):
- Refine subscription notification logic

Resize coalescer:
- Add configurable debounce thresholds
- Improve storm detection heuristics

Terminal writer:
- Add write buffering optimizations

Undo history:
- Improve state snapshot efficiency
- Add history size limits

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
